title: Brevo Mail Automate Integration
excerpt: Hi! can you help to integrate brevo apps to monday.com? thank you.

posts.author: draw (Hendrawan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! can you help to integrate brevo apps to monday.com? thank you.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @draw

Absolutely, integrating Brevo with Monday.com can streamline your workflow by automating contact syncing, email tracking, and campaign management directly from your project board. We can set up a seamless connection between the two apps using Make.com or Zapier, ensuring real-time data transfer without manual input. Some key automation possibilities include:

  • Syncing contacts and leads between Brevo and Monday.com
  • Automating email campaigns based on board updates
  • Tracking email engagement directly in Monday.com
  • Custom workflows to match your specific business needs

Let’s Schedule the call
